transcript: All right you guys today's food Friday is gonna be a little bit different today's food Friday is sponsored by oak leaf Oak leaf was kind enough to send us a whole bunch of really cool stuff I'll put links for all of these down in the video description below They sent some basters some skewers some awesome bowls with lids and we actually got a whole bunch more of those bowls I I think these are the only two ones I'm going to need for this video and we're going to show you guys how we make our shish kebabs. Because look, I have all the barbecue stuff to make it. It's not dog treats, so I'm sorry. We're making food for your daddy and I, so that's what we're doing right now. Okay, so the first thing we're going to do is we're going to get the meat that we need ready. Jamie likes steak, I like shrimp, so we're doing two different kinds. So first, First, I'm going to cut it in half and then I'm going to cut it in half and then I'm going to shrimp. Okay, now we got... This is marinating and this is thawing. Now we gotta cut up other stuff. Oh, and because I forgot to say, I'm marinating the meat in Italian dressing. And it's just a Denver steak that I cut up. That's all the meat was. Okay, now I'm gonna cut up some mushrooms, some little sweet peppers, a yellow squash, some zucchini and some green peppers. And I'm gonna throw them... I'm gonna wash them and then cut them up. And then I'm gonna throw them all in this bowl. Now we've got everything cut up, we're gonna start putting it on the skewers. Alright, now comes the part where we're gonna build the shish kebabs I always try to put a green pepper on the end because I feel like it holds it so it'll like has a pocket and like the next thing you put on it like we'll put a piece of meat on it next see how it's got like a pocket there you go the meat fits right there and then what are we gonna put on it i don't know how about a zucchini and then maybe a mushroom and then how about some squash and then maybe a yellow pepper and basically you just make it up as you go along oh i should have taken the seeds out of that. Oh well! Now, put another piece of meat on there. So yeah! Now, I'm gonna build a whole bunch of these. Alright! So now, I've got all the shish kebabs made. I've got more Italian dressing and my little brush. And now, we're gonna go put these on the grill. And basically, what I'm gonna do with this is keep it out there and I'm gonna keep brushing over all this stuff but I'll show you that in a minute all right grill is lit food is out here I'm gonna close this lid let the grill heat up a little bit are you helping you helping got my stuff to baste everything with now I'll give it a little bit to warm up well chill out with the dogs don't even think about it shorty. Uh-uh, that ain't for you Where's the Shelby? There she is. There's a Shelby. Pretty nice day for grilling. Can't complain Like I said thought we'd do something different for food Friday this week You guys always seem to really like it when I show you how we make stuff So I figured since I had to make stuff, this is what we're gonna do Alright now that everything's out there I'm there, I'm going to take just a little bit of this, get it on your brush and kind of paint them. I don't put a lot because if you put a lot, it'll like drip down through the grill and just make everything burn. So, I just do a little bit and then I do it again when I flip them. So, that's what we're doing now. Alright! Everything looks pretty done! Time for dinner! Look! I made food! See? You are here in Food Friday! And so are you! I made this while you guys were playing with rocks! Alright! There's three with shrimp and the rest have not shrimp! Awesome! So pick one! Go ahead ahead! I'll take one of these not shrimps. You guys are both going to take not shrimp. Alright! Show them how it's done. Grab a piece of meat or shrimpies. Let's go to the next one. Yep! Go to the next one. Ta-da! Add some rice if you like. I didn't make rice. Do you want rice? I might. Okay might make some. Hi Oakley! There you go! Looking good! Two pieces! Hi Shelby! What? What's going on? Why are you so close to me? Her eyes! She's like, I can almost reach your plate. There's nothing on that plate you can have anymore. And then Oakley's over here and then Memphis is actually being good. She's under the table. Man, I'm gonna keep on keeping warm. Was dinner good? Yes, delicious. I did good. All of it was good. I especially like the habanero garlic. Yeah, that was kind of crazy. The habanero garlic was good and the mushrooms was good. Yeah, the mushrooms are always good. The squash is good, meat is good. Food was a win. Food Friday was a win. Yeah. All right you guys, so there you go. We got the skewers, the brush, the bowls and like I said, if you want to order any of the stuff that you see here, there will be links down in the video description below. That's how much food we had left over, which means Jamie and I will have leftovers for tomorrow. Alright you guys! As always... Thanks for watching! Thanks for subscribing! Stay positive and dream big! And we will see you again soon! Where's Memphis? I think she's napping! Goodbye! Gee! I should have known better! You're looking for food, huh? Ha! Ha! Ha! Thanks for liking and subscribing to Snow Dogs Vlogs! Thanks for watching! Subscribe for more! Thanks for watching! Subscribe for more! Thanks for watching! Subscribe for more! Thanks for watching! Subscribe for more!
